market_summary: Regime (pack): MIXED / fragile risk-on attempt. SPY 1m=-2.79% and QQQ 1m=-1.15% with MA50=false (trend not repaired), while GLD remains strong (1m=+2.09%, mom=+31.04%, MA50/MA200=true).

Breadth/leadership (pack): leadership remains concentrated in real assets/defense/energy + select semis. XOM (mom=+31.39%), LMT (mom=+29.82%), GLD (mom=+31.04%) lead; semis are mixed but still high-mom on 90d (KLAC mom=+42.31%, TSM mom=+33.48%) despite recent 1m softness in parts of the complex (TSM 1m=-8.09%).

Go/No-go (IC): NO-GO for rebalance (rebalance due today=false). Maintain portfolio; only monitor for thesis damage and readiness to act at next eligible checkpoint if trend/breadth improves or idiosyncratic risk emerges.

thesis_damage_flags.why: Pack shows weak intermediate momentum vs peers (3m=-20.57%, dd63=-14.25%) and elevated valuation risk (P/E ~62.9; EV/EBITDA ~43.4) with meaningful leverage (debt/equity ~1.13). No tool-verified 7d catalyst in this run (news signals: UNKNOWN).

Momentum remains top-tier (mom=+42.31%) but near-term risk is elevated: high vol20 ~45.47% and dd63 ~-22.41% (pack). Requires tighter monitoring; no tool-verified 7d catalyst in this run (news signals: UNKNOWN).

thesis: Catalyst: none (non-rebalance day). Maintain the existing quality+momentum barbell: real assets/defense ballast (GLD/XOM/LMT) + AI/semi leaders (NVDA/TSM/KLAC/AVGO) + quality growth in HC (LLY).
Factor edge: with SPY/QQQ MA50=false (pack), turnover is penalized; current book already aligns with relative leaders (GLD/XOM/LMT/KLAC/TSM) and avoids adding low-confidence names.
Variant view: resist forcing changes in a mixed regime; preserve optionality for next eligible rebalance if breadth repairs or if AVGO/TSM/NVDA show renewed 30d strength vs benchmarks.
risks: Macro: renewed equity drawdown or rates/credit stress could hit semis and high-multiple growth even if GLD holds up.
Idiosyncratic: single-name shocks in semis (NVDA/AVGO/TSM/KLAC) or drug pricing/regulatory headlines (LLY) could dominate 30d outcomes.
Execution/liquidity: none today (no trades). Next rebalance should use staged sizing for higher-vol names (KLAC/NVDA/TSM).
falsifiable_checks: Trend check (next runs, pack-based): if SPY MA50 remains false AND SPY 1m stays < 0, maintain defensive ballast (GLD/XOM/LMT) and cap incremental cyclicality adds.
Holding-level risk check (next eligible rebalance, pack-based): if KLAC dd63 worsens to <= -30% or AVGO 3m stays <= -20% with mom falling below +5%, review for replacement at next eligible rebalance.
trade_of_the_day.why_now: Base: rebalance is not permitted today (cadence min spacing not met). Bull: existing leaders (GLD/XOM/LMT + select semis) continue to carry returns with contained drawdowns. Bear: if mixed regime deteriorates, avoiding turnover today preserves flexibility and reduces whipsaw/slippage.
